overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through open prairie grassland. The character encounters a horseback rider and a covered wagon while traversing the rural landscape with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt trail with tall grass

events.description: NPC rider on horseback enters from right and passes ahead of the character
flock of birds takes flight from the grass near the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the prairie

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse past the player from right to left

entered.detail: worn dirt path with grass growing in the middle
tall green grass covering the plains
tall green grass covering the plains
rocky mountain peaks on the horizon
small clusters of oak trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland under a clear blue sky. A rider on horseback passes by from right to left, and a flock of birds takes flight from the grass. Distant mountains are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with horse-drawn wagon passing

events.description: covered wagon with team of horses appears ahead on the path
wagon passes by on the right side continuing down the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, stepping aside slightly as the wagon passes

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn covered wagon with two horses moving toward and then past the character

entered.detail: large grey rock formation beside the trail
leafless dead tree standing in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a horse-drawn covered wagon approaches from ahead and passes by on the right. The trail passes a large boulder and dead tree while the distant mountains shift to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding prairie trail with mountain vistas

events.description: character turns left and walks off the trail into the tall grass
character turns back onto the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail with a brief detour into the grass to explore the surroundings before returning to the path

entered.detail: large rocky mountain peak becoming visible on the left horizon
large leafy tree ahead on the trail
cluster of rocks in the grass beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open prairie with expansive mountain views. After briefly leaving the path to explore the grass, the character returns to the trail and approaches a large cottonwood tree in the distance. The landscape remains wide open with prominent rock formations visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a dirt trail through an expansive prairie that gradually reveals more prominent rock formations and distant peaks. It begins with the character walking under a clear blue sky as a rider on horseback passes by and a flock of birds takes flight from the grass. As the character continues forward, a horse-drawn covered wagon approaches and passes on the right, while the path leads past a large boulder and a dead tree. The scene then expands to show wider mountain views as the character briefly wanders into the grass before returning to the trail. Finally, the camera moves toward a large cottonwood tree in the distance, framed by the wide-open landscape and towering rock formations.
